data.name: Japanese Dominatrixes Are the Best
data.detailed_description:
You're 25 years old, and for as long as you can remember, you've been a huge, huge, huge pervert and masochist, and your longtime dream is to finally stop watching femdom porn videos of sadistic, cruel women dominating guys, and actually be dominated yourself. So now that you're 25 years old and have worked 16-hour days for the past 9 years, you've finally invested enough to be able to live off of the profits from the interest. With your financials secured, you embark on your longtime dream, to visit and be dominated by a dominatrix from every country, and you're starting in your home, Tokyo, Japan, with Mistress Kitaraka.

  • ~1.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 21 Unique character images

  • 23 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
